preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.0.1: Critical hotfix — Electron rollback fixes Mac crashes, Windows auth fix, no more keychain prompts.
whatsNew: Fixed Mac crash on launch (Electron 39 incompatibility on newer Macs — rolled back to 33)
Fixed Windows auth flow (reverted to system browser, in-app window was broken in Electron 39)
Fixed macOS keychain prompts on every update (now uses plaintext with 0600 permissions)
